data.name: AlliedSocietiesTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Allied society material and currency obtains use Filter Obtained on General. Options labeled Hide … hide those lines when checked. Per-society currency toggles appear when the master hide is off. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific obtain text.

data.name: AlliedSocietiesTab_HideBeastTribeCraftingMaterialsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Hides allied society crafting material obtain messages. eg. You obtain Starboard Hull Component Materials

data.name: AlliedSocietiesTab_HideBeastTribeCurrenciesMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Hides allied society currency obtain messages for all 18 allied societies (through Yok Huy in Dawntrail), including Pelu Pelplume, Mamool Ja Nanook, and Yok Huy Ward.

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_ChatHistoryTimer
data.value: Number of seconds to keep messages in chat history

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_EnableChatHistoryFilterHelpMarker
data.value: If a message was sent within the last {0} messages it will be filtered

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_IgnoreMessagesSentByPlayerHelpMarker
data.value: Filters duplicate messages sent by the player, enable if you want duplicate messages you sent to be filtered from your view.

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_LengthOfChatHistory
data.value: Number of messages to keep in chat history

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_LengthOfChatHistoryWarningMessage
data.value: WARNING: Having the history length set too high may impact game performance. It's recommended to keep it at 50 or lower.

data.name: ChatHistoryTab_SelectChannels
data.value: Select channels for Chat History to filter:

data.name: CombatTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Combat log options filter Action, Battle System, and NPC Party channels directly—there is no separate General master toggle. Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can override.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatAbilitiesMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 501, 533 — eg. You ready Iron Will. / You use Heavy Swing. / The enemy uses Fire.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatAddsMessages
data.value: Show adds calling for help messages

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatAddsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 555 — eg. The goblin calls for help!

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatCastingMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 502, 534, 537, 538, 540, 541, 542, 1472 — eg. The enemy begins casting Fire.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatDamageMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 447–523 (13 IDs) — eg. You hit the enemy for 1,234 damage. / Direct hit! You hit the enemy for 12,345 damage.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatDefeatMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 557, 558 — eg. The enemy is defeated.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatEffectsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 526–551, 528, 596, 604, 607, 617, 640, 603 (13 IDs) — eg. You gain the effect of Regen. / You recover from the effect of Poison.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatEnemyReadyMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 501 — eg. The enemy readies Spinning Slash.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatEnmityMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 536 — eg. The enemy's enmity toward you increases!

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatHealingMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 519, 520, 560 — eg. You recover 500 HP. / You are revived.

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatMissesMessages
data.value: Show combat miss and evade messages

data.name: CombatTab_ShowCombatMissesMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 506, 515, 600, 612 — eg. The attack misses you. / The attack misses. / You are unaffected.

data.name: ConfigWindow_KofiTitleBarTooltip
data.value: Ko-fi (because hiding chat spam is thirsty work)

data.name: ConfigWindow_SettingAlwaysOn
data.value: This message type is always shown and cannot be toggled.

data.name: CraftingTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Synthesis and crafting-channel lines need Filter Crafting Channels on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific lines.

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowAllOtherCraftingHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for step-by-step crafting log lines (LogMessages 1150, 1154, 1162, …). eg. You begin synthesizing a Linen Bandana. When on, use nested options for buff effect gain (603) and able to execute (5533). Unchecking hides all nested lines until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings).

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowCraftingAbleToExecuteHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 5533 — eg. You are now able to execute … (Gathering channel during crafting).

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowCraftingBuffEffectGainHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 603 — eg. You gain the effect of Inner Quiet (crafting buff channel).

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowCraftingSynthesisCompleteHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1156, 1157, 1158, 1178 — eg. You synthesize a Linen Bandana. / Proof of completion recorded in crafting log!

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowOtherPlayerCompletedSynthesisMessages
data.value: Show synthesis message when other players complete a craft.

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowOtherPlayerCompletedSynthesisMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1156 — eg. Raven synthesizes a Linen Bandana.

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowTrialSynthesisMessages
data.value: Show final status messages upon finishing a Trial synthesis

data.name: CraftingTab_ShowTrialSynthesisMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 5902, 5904, 5906, 5907, 5908 — eg. Your trial synthesis of Alchemical Ink proved a success! / Quality 42 / 100

data.name: CurrenciesTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Most options use Filter Obtained on General. Gil receive lines also need Filter System. Options labeled Hide … hide those lines when checked; Show … allow when checked. Per-tomestone toggles hide individual tomestones. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific obtain text.

data.name: Shared_FilterObtainedDisabledWarning
data.value: Enable {0} on the {1} tab. While it is off, none of the options below filter obtain messages—they will still appear in chat.

data.name: CurrenciesTab_HideInventoryItemAddedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 789 — eg. The archeo kingdom wristband of casting is added to your inventory. (LogMessage 789; often duplicates "You obtain …" on retainer ventures.)

data.name: CurrenciesTab_ShowGeneralItemObtainsHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 720, 743, 750, 751, 1606, 1607, 3208, 3617 — Master toggle for general item obtain lines on the LootNotice channel (excluding currency-specific filters below).

data.name: CurrenciesTab_HideGilMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1258, 1417, 1605, 1798, 10923 — eg. You obtain 69 gil or You receive 1,670 gil. Obtain lines need Filter Obtained channel; receive lines need Filter System channel (General tab).

data.name: CurrenciesTab_HideGrandCompanySealsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1300 — eg. You obtain 420 Flame Seals. Grand Company seals (Flame, Storm, Serpent) only—not Allied Society or Centurio seals (separate Hide options below).

data.name: CurrenciesTab_ShowObtainedQuestItemsHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1232 — eg. You obtain the mysterious artifact.

data.name: CurrenciesTab_HideSacksOfNutsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: eg. You obtain 100 sacks of Nuts.

data.name: CurrenciesTab_HideTomestoneWeeklyCapMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 2174 — eg. You cannot receive any more Allagan tomestones of mnemonics this week. Uses Filter System on General.

data.name: CurrenciesTab_HideTomestoneByIdHelpMarker
data.value: Checked = hide obtain messages for this tomestone type.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Deep dungeon lines use Filter System on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific lines.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAccursedHoardDiscoveredMessages
data.value: Show when Accursed Hoard is discovered

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAccursedHoardDiscoveredMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7274 — eg. You discover a piece of the Accursed Hoard!

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAccursedHoardNotSensedMessages
data.value: Show when Accursed Hoard is not sensed on the current floor

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAccursedHoardNotSensedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7273 — eg. You do not sense the call of the Accursed Hoard on the current floor.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAccursedHoardSensedMessages
data.value: Show when Accursed Hoard is sensed

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAccursedHoardSensedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7272 — eg. You sense the Accursed Hoard calling you…

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAetherpoolIncreasesMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7250 — eg. Your Aetherpool arm strength increases to 10.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowAetherpoolRemainsUnchangedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7251 — eg. Your Aetherpool arm strength remains unchanged.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowCairnOfPassageActivatedMessages
data.value: Show when the Cairn of Passage is activated

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowCairnOfPassageActivatedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7245 — eg. The Cairn of Passage is activated!

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowCairnOfPassageGlowsMessages
data.value: Show when the Cairn of Passage begins to glow

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowCairnOfPassageGlowsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7242 — eg. The Cairn of Passage begins to glow!

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowCairnOfReturnUsedMessages
data.value: Show when Cairn of Return is used

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowCairnOfReturnUsedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7243 — eg. The Cairn of Return restores life to the fallen!

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowFloorNumberMessages
data.value: Show floor number when entering a new floor

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowFloorNumberMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 7249, 7265, 7270, 9218 — eg. Floor 5 / The current duty uses an independent leveling system.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowObtainedPomanderMessages
data.value: Show when the party obtains a pomander

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowObtainedPomanderMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 7220, 7221, 7222 — eg. You obtain a pomander of sight.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowPomanderEffectsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 7254–7264 — eg. A pomander of sight is expended.

data.name: DeepDungeonsTab_ShowTrapTriggeredMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 7224, 7225, 7226, 7227, 7228, 7229 — eg. The landmine is triggered... / The luring trap is triggered... / The detonator is triggered!

data.name: DesynthesisTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Desynthesis item and obtain lines use Filter System on General. Level increases use Filter Progress on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: DutyTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Duty Finder and completion lines use Filter System on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific lines.

data.name: DutyTab_ShowDutyFinderMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 94–4682 — duty registration briefing (4670–4682), registration complete (897), withdrawn (890/902), unrestricted party (4676), recruitment (94). Withdrawal notices use the error channel; minimum IL active (4680) uses the progress channel.

data.name: EconomyTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Vendor, trade, market board, and most gil lines use Filter System on General. Retainer sale completions use the Retainer Sale channel (under Filter System). Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowCompletedVentureHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 4332, 4335, 4341 — eg. RetainerName has completed a venture!

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowGilSpentMessageHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4590 — eg. You spend gil on a purchase.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowGilWithdrawnMessageHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 736 — eg. Your gil has been safely withdrawn.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketAllItemsSoldHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 384 — every listing on that retainer sold (Retainer Sale channel).

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketBoardMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for retainer sale lines. When on, use the nested options for per-item sold (748), all-items-sold summary (384), and listing started/stopped (398/399). Unchecking disables all nested sale lines in chat until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings for next time). Improved market board lines on General only affect per-item sold (748).

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketBoardSellingStatusHelpMarker
data.value:
LogMessages 398, 399 — When you begin or end selling on a retainer’s market board listing.
Examples: You are now selling items in the Limsa Lominsa markets. / You are no longer selling items in the … markets.
System channel. Shown only when Show market board item sales is enabled. Requires Filter System channel on General.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketGilEntrustedToRetainer
data.value: Show market sale gil entrusted to retainer

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketGilEntrustedToRetainerHelpMarker
data.value:
LogMessage 4578 — After sales finish, the lump-sum gil sent to your retainer’s inventory (not the per-item sold line).
Example: Gil earned from market sales has been entrusted to your retainer.
System channel. Independent of “Show market board sales” and its nested sale lines—you can leave this off while per-item or all-items sold lines are on (with market board sales enabled). Requires Filter System channel on General.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowMarketItemSoldHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 748 — one listing sold (Retainer Sale channel). Example: The bolt of vanya silk sold for 4,228 gil.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowRetainerVentureMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 4330, 4331, 4334 — eg. You assign your retainer to Quick Exploration. You pay a retainer 2 ventures.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowVendorPurchaseMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 734, 1687 — eg. You purchase an item from a vendor.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowVendorSellMessages
data.value: Show Items sold to vendor or retainer

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowVendorSellMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1688 — eg. You sell 3 Shisui gobies for 6 gil.

data.name: EmotesTab_FilterCustomEmoteChannelHelpMarker
data.value: This will hide all Custom Emotes unless it is an emote targeting you or an emote you used.

data.name: EmotesTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Standard emotes use Filter Standard Emotes below. Custom emotes use Filter Custom Emote Channel. Show options control which custom emote lines appear when filtering is enabled.

data.name: EmotesTab_FilterStandardEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: This will hide all emote text unless it is an emote targeting you or an emote you used.

data.name: EmotesTab_ShowOtherCustomEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: This will hide all "/em" messages unless it mentions you or is a custom emote you used. eg. Another Player leans over and gives you a big bear hug.

data.name: EmotesTab_ShowSelfCustomEmotesHelpMarker
data.value: When emote filtering is enabled, keep messages for emotes you use yourself. eg. You gently pat <user>

data.name: ExplorationTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Hunt and exploration lines use Filter System on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific lines.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Workshop and message-book lines use Filter System on General. FC login/logout uses the FC login/logout channel (no extra General toggle).

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowAirshipVoyageMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4163 — eg. A new exploratory voyage destination...has been discovered!

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowSubaquaticVoyageEmbarkedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 6057 — eg. Submersible has embarked on a subaquatic voyage.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowSubaquaticVoyageFinalizedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 6059 — eg. Submersible subaquatic voyage finalized.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowSubaquaticVoyageOtherFinalizedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 6060 — eg. Another player finalizes a subaquatic voyage (Free Company channel).

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowSubaquaticVoyageReturnedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 6061 — eg. Submersible has returned from its subaquatic voyage.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowSubmarinePartRepairedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4168 — eg. Submarine part has been repaired.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowSubmarineRetrievalLevelsIncreasedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 6092 — eg. Submersible's retrieval levels increased by 3.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowSubmarineVoyageMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for submarine voyage, repair, and rank messages below. When on, use the nested options. Unchecking disables all nested options in chat until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings for next time). Airship voyage above is separate.

data.name: FishingTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Fishing lines need Filter Gathering channels on General.

data.name: CosmicExplorationTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Stellar and cosmic system lines need Filter System channel on General. Stellar and cosmic gathering-channel lines need Filter Gathering channels on General. Custom Filters (Tools) can refine cosmic lines further.

data.name: GatheringTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Gathering lines need Filter Gathering channels on General. Elemental shard obtains also need Filter Obtained.

data.name: GatheringTab_HideGatheringAttemptsLocationMessages
data.value: Hide only locations that affect gathering attempts

data.name: GatheringTab_HideGatheringAttemptsLocationMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1116 — location lines that change gathering attempt counts. Checked = hide.

data.name: GatheringTab_HideGatheringBoonLocationMessages
data.value: Hide only locations that affect Gatherer's Boon

data.name: GatheringTab_HideGatheringBoonLocationMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1117 — location lines that change Gatherer's Boon rate. Checked = hide.

data.name: GatheringTab_HideGatheringYieldLocationMessages
data.value: Hide only locations that affect gathering yield

data.name: GatheringTab_HideGatheringYieldLocationMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1115 — location lines that change gathering yield. Checked = hide.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowAetherialReductionMinigameMessages
data.value: Show collectable reduction minigame messages (integrity, woodsman actions, etc.)

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowAetherialReductionMinigameMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 3549, 3569, 5514, 5516, 5550, 5573, 5574 — eg. Your meticulous actions prove effective. Integrity is not reduced.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowAetherialReductionSuccessMessages
data.value: Show message when you successfully reduce a collectable item

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowAllOtherGatheringHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for miscellaneous gathering log lines. When on, use the nested option for buff effect gain (603). Unchecking disables the nested option in chat until you turn this back on (the nested checkbox keeps its setting for next time).

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowCosmicClassPointsAndDataset
data.value: Show cosmic class points and dataset submission

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowCosmicClassPointsAndDatasetHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 10874 (System), 10803 (Progress) — class points and dataset submission. Needs Filter System and Filter Progress on General.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowCosmicContainersHelpMarker
data.value:
LogMessage 10750 — cosmic container obtains (Loot Notice). Separate from cosmocredits and class points. Needs Filter Obtained on General.
You can also block container lines with Tools → Custom Filters (Block, pattern such as /cosmic container/i, Loot + System channels) while leaving currency obtains on.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowCosmicDailyProgressHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 10875, 10877, 11156 — daily points and daily success lines (System). Needs Filter System on General.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowCosmicExplorationMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 10807, 10830, 10881, 10884, 11334, 11335 — mech-op directives and red-alert lines. Needs Filter System on General.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowCosmicRewardsHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 10800, 10859, 10872, 10873, 10883, 11331 — cosmocredits, Auxesia/Oizys credits, fortunes, dronebits (not containers or class points).

data.name: GatheringTab_HideElementalShardsCrystalsClustersMessages
data.value: Hide elemental shards, crystals, and clusters

data.name: GatheringTab_HideElementalShardsCrystalsClustersMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Hides obtain messages for elemental shards, crystals, and clusters from gathering, loot rolls, loot notices, and desynthesis (LogMessages 4322, 4323). eg. You obtain 30 ice shards

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowFishAddedToGuideMessages
data.value: Show message when a fish is added to the fish guide

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowFishingFlavorTextHelpMarker
data.value:
Shows Fisher's Intuition messages ("the scent of baitfish...") and per-fish lure flavor text (loaded from game data at startup).
For other gathering lines this toggle does not cover (e.g. big-fish feeling text), use Tools → Custom Filters: Allow, Gathering channel only, regex such as /winged shadow|golden|gentle giant|dark form/i. Requires Filter Gathering channels on General so Allow can un-hide matching lines.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowFishingHoleDiscovered
data.value: Show message when a fishing location is discovered

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowFishingHoleName
data.value: Show name of fishing hole when line is cast

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowGatheringBuffEffectGainHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 603 — buff effect gain on the gain-buff channel during gathering.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowGatheringCollectableObtainMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 3538 (LootNotice) — eg. You obtain a chunk of rare gold artichoke ore. Often appears on the Gathering channel in chat; needs Filter Obtained or Filter Gathering on General.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowGatheringSensesLabel
data.value: Show "You sense..." messages for gathering locations

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowLocationGatheringEffectMessages
data.value: Show message when location affects gathering yield, receiving Gatherer's Boon, or gathering attempts

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowLureMessages
data.value: Show Modest/Ambitious Lure and bite feeling messages

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowLureMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 5565, 5566, 5569, 5570, 5571, 5572 — eg. You attempt to lure small-jawed fish to your hook. / You have a feeling you've attracted a fish with a weak bite!

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowMooching
data.value: Show message after recasting with a moochable fish

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowObtainedSandsFromAetherialReductionMessages
data.value: Show the number of obtained sands after using aetherial reduction

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowStellarAbleToExecuteHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 5533, 11365 — stellar mission action ready lines.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowStellarBuffEffectGainHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 11366 — buff effect gain during stellar missions.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowStellarMissionMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for stellar mission catch-all lines (LogMessages 631–11383, 21 IDs). When on, use nested options for able-to-execute (5533, 11365) and buff gain (11366). Unchecking disables all nested options in chat until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings for next time). Cosmic exploration options below are separate.

data.name: GatheringTab_StellarSectionFilteringNote
data.value: Stellar and cosmic system lines need Filter System channel on General. Stellar and cosmic gathering-channel lines need Filter Gathering channels on General. Custom Filters (Tools) can refine cosmic or fishing lines further.

data.name: GeneralTab_BlockCountHelpMarker
data.value: Count is only updated every 100 blocked messages, when changing zones, or when logging off.

data.name: GeneralTab_BlockedMessages
data.value: Tidy Chat has blocked {0:n0} messages so far

data.name: GeneralTab_CopySayMessage
data.value: Automatically copy improved /say message to clipboard

data.name: GeneralTab_CopySayMessageHelpMarker
data.value: Requires Improved /Say message for quests to be enabled

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterCraftingSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Crafting channel messages are hidden unless a Show option on the Crafting/Gathering tab allows them. When disabled, Crafting is not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterGatheringSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Gathering and Gathering System messages are hidden unless a Show option on the Crafting/Gathering tab allows them (or a Custom Filter Allow rule matches). When disabled, those channels are not filtered here—Custom Filter Allow rules on Gathering will not take effect.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilteringNote
data.value: These master toggles gate whole chat channels. When a channel is filtered, Show options on other tabs decide what still appears. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific lines afterward.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterLootSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Loot Roll messages are hidden unless a Show option on the Obtain tab allows them (cast lot, your rolls, party rolls). Item obtained lines use the Obtained channel. When disabled, Loot Roll is not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterObtainedSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Obtained (loot notice) messages are hidden unless an Obtain tab option allows them. Show … = allow when checked; Hide … = hide when checked. When disabled, Obtained is not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterProgressSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, Progress and Battle System messages are hidden unless a Show option allows them (Progress tab: XP, level-ups, achievements; Crafting/Gathering: cosmic dataset submissions). Progress tab quest lines use the System channel—also enable Filter System channel. When disabled, Progress and Battle System are not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_FilterSystemSpamHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, System and Retainer Sale messages are hidden unless a Show option allows them (System, Economy, Party, Duty, Progress tab quest lines, Crafting/Gathering stellar/cosmic system lines, and similar). When disabled, those channels are not filtered here.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedCommendationsDutyName
data.value: Include completed duty with commendations message

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedCommendationsDutyNameHelpMarker
data.value: Requires Improved Player Commendations to be enabled

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedDutyCommenceMessagingHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1531 — replaces duty entry spam with a single line: Duty Name has begun. Hides level sync (618, 9602), item level sync (4224, 9606), alliance reform (9795), and Echo briefing (4217) lines.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedInstanceMessagingHelpMarker
data.value: Changes the instance text to: You are now in instance: #

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedMarketBoardSale
data.value: Improved market board & retainer sale lines

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedMarketBoardSaleHelpMarker
data.value:
Rewrites the default long sold message into a short item + gil line.
Example: Pair of titanium gold saberfangs sold for 757 gil.
Shows those sold lines when enabled (Filter System channel on General). Does not show “gil entrusted to your retainer”—turn on Show market sale gil entrusted to retainer on Economy only if you want that follow-up line.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedNoviceNetworkMessages
data.value: Improved Novice Network join and leave messages

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedNoviceNetworkMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Reduces the amount of Novice Network text when the Novice Network is joined and changes the leave message to be consistently worded.

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedPlayerCommendationsHelpMarker
data.value: Disables System message for received commendations and instead logs a single message to your Dalamud General Chat Channel (check your Dalamud General Settings for which channel that is - it is Debug by default)

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedSayMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: When a quest requires you to /Say something in chat, change the message into one that can be copy and pasted easily

data.name: GeneralTab_ImprovedTreasureDungeonMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: When kicked from a treasure dungeon, replaces the trap message with a concise message showing which floor you were kicked on.

data.name: GeneralTab_InstanceInDTRBar
data.value: Display current instance in DTR Bar

data.name: GeneralTab_TidyChatTag
data.value: Add [TidyChat] tag to any modified messages

data.name: GeneralTab_TidyChatTagHelpMarker
data.value: Prepends messages sent or modified by Tidy Chat with [TidyChat]

data.name: GlamourTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Glamour and character gear lines use Filter System on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific lines.

data.name: GoldSaucerTab_FilteringNote
data.value: MGP obtain lines use Filter Obtained on General. Minigame and Triple Triad lines use Filter System. Options labeled Hide … hide those lines when checked.

data.name: GoldSaucerTab_HideMGPMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 4735, 4765 — eg. You obtain 117 MGP (Obtained channel) or You use 100 MGP to purchase a Jumbo Cactpot ticket (System channel).

data.name: GoldSaucerTab_ShowSwingMinigames
data.value: Show Out on a Limb / The Finer Miner swing feedback

data.name: GoldSaucerTab_ShowSwingMinigamesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 4784–4793 — System channel. Out on a Limb (4789–4793) and The Finer Miner (4784–4788) reuse 1.x gathering feedback text, e.g. You take up your hatchet, You sense nothing, You're right on top of it!

data.name: GoldSaucerTab_ShowTripleTriadAllowedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4763 — eg. Triple Triad matches are allowed in the current area.

data.name: GoldSaucerTab_ShowTripleTriadNotAllowed
data.value: Show Triple Triad not allowed here

data.name: GoldSaucerTab_ShowTripleTriadNotAllowedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4764 — eg. Triple Triad matches are not allowed in the current area.

data.name: HousingTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Sanctuary and housing ward lines use Filter System on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: MateriaTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Attach, extract, and overmeld lines use Filter Crafting Channels on General. Retrieve and shatter lines use Filter System on General. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaExtractedMessages
data.value: Show message when materia is extracted from spiritbonded gear

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaOvermeldFailuresMessages
data.value: Show message when materia fails to be overmelded onto gear

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaShattersMessages
data.value: Show message when materia shatters during retrieval

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaSuccesfullyAttachedMessages
data.value: Show message when materia is successfully attached to gear

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowSuccesfullyRetrievedMateriaMessages
data.value: Show message when you successfully retrieve materia from gear

data.name: NormalizeSpecialCharactersExceptInPartyOrAllianceChannels
data.value: Normalize special characters - except in Party or Alliance channels

data.name: PartyTab_CastYourLotHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 5180 — when you cast your lot on loot. eg. You cast your lot for the <item>

data.name: PartyTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Party invites and tools use Filter System on General. Loot rolls use Filter Loot Roll; other-player obtains use Filter Obtained. Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can refine matching lines.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowAnotherPlayerCastsLotMessages
data.value: Show "Another Player casts his/her lot <item>" messages

data.name: PartyTab_ShowAnotherPlayerCastsLotMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 5180 — when another player casts lot on loot (not your roll result). eg. Some player casts her lot for <item>.

data.name: PartyTab_HideAnotherPlayerObtainsItemMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Hides loot obtain messages for other players in your party (eg. Some player obtains an <item>!). LootNotice lines need Filter Obtained; LootRoll lines need Filter Loot Roll on General. Checked = hide.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowAnotherPlayerRollsMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1231 — master toggle for when another player rolls Need, Greed, or Pass on loot in your party. eg. Another Player rolls Greed on <item>. 50! When on, use the nested party-only filter. Unchecking disables the nested option in chat until you turn this back on (the nested checkbox keeps its setting for next time).

data.name: PartyTab_ShowCountdownMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 5255, 5256, 5260, 5264 — eg. Battle commencing in 18 seconds!

data.name: PartyTab_ShowNowALeaderHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 15–9298 (12 IDs) — These messages occur when made the leader of a party, Free Company, PvP party, Linkshell, or Cross-world Linkshell.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowOnlyPartyMemberRolls
data.value: Show only rolls from party members

data.name: PartyTab_ShowOnlyPartyMemberRollsHelpMarker
data.value: When enabled, hides loot roll messages from players outside your party (e.g. other alliance parties in a 24-man raid). Only applies when “Show Another Player rolls” is enabled. When that master is off, this filter does not run.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowOtherPlayersLootRollsHelpMarker
data.value: Shows when other players cast lot or roll on loot.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowPartyObjectiveOnJoin
data.value: Show Party objective & comment on join

data.name: PartyTab_ShowSealedOffMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 2012, 2013, 2014 — eg. The area has been sealed off! / The area is no longer sealed.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowYouRolledMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1231 — your Need/Greed/Pass roll result only (not other players' rolls). eg. You roll Need on the <item>. 63!

data.name: ProgressTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Quest & achievements and most unlocks use the System channel (see each help). Duty roulette and adventurer-in-need bonus awards use Filter Obtained (checked = hide). XP, PvP EXP, Series EXP, and level-ups use Filter Progress on General (checked = show). PvP zone announcements use Filter System. Mount unlocks use the Action channel. Custom Filters on Tools can Allow or Block specific Progress or System text.

data.name: ProgressTab_HideAdventurerInNeedAwardMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 2244 — eg. A bonus of 7,200 gil has been awarded for being an adventurer in need.

data.name: ProgressTab_HideBonusAwardForDutyRouletteMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 2246 — eg. A bonus of 4,252,498 experience points and 12,000 gil has been awarded for using the duty roulette.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowEarnedAchievementMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 952 — eg. You earn the achievement <name>! Uses the Progress channel.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowExperienceGainMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 549, 588, 589, 4466, 7300, 10953 — eg. You gain 2,388 Experience Points. Most XP uses the Progress channel (Filter Progress channel on General). Bonus chain lines use the battle log and are not controlled by Progress filtering alone.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowFirstClearAwardHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4225 — first-time duty clear bonus lines.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowLearnedAbilityMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 552, 609, 1461, 3612, 3613 — When you learn an ability or minion. Most lines use the Progress channel; a few job quest lines use System.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowLevelUpMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 590, 591 — eg. You attain level 90! / Raven attains astrologian level 69!

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowMountMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 646 (Action), 1306 (System) — eg. You have unlocked the ability to summon this mount / flying speed increased.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayerLevelUpMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 3921, 9454 — eg. Player attains level 33! Uses the system channel.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayersEarnedAchievementMessages
data.value: Show other player's earned achievement messages

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayersEarnedAchievementMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 952 — eg. Player earns the achievement <name>! Uses the Progress channel.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowOtherPlayersLevelUpMessages
data.value: Show other player's level up messages

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowPvpExpGainMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 659 — eg. You acquire 500 PvP EXP.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowPvpRankMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 660 — eg. You attain PvP rank 17!

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowSeriesProgressMessages
data.value: Show PvP Series EXP and level messages

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowSeriesProgressMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 7556, 7557 — eg. You acquire 1,500 Series EXP. / You attain Series level 2!

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowPvpZoneAnnouncements
data.value: Show PvP zone triumph and gauge messages

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowPvpZoneAnnouncementsHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 11308, 11311–11313, 11368 — Worqor Chirteh triumph, limit gauge, aurora, and weather lines. Uses Filter System on General.

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowQuestProgressMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 410, 1601, 1602, 1603, 3780, 3783 — eg. "Starting from Scrap" accepted. / "Starting from Scrap" complete! / "Starting from Scrap" objective fulfilled!

data.name: ProgressTab_ShowSecondChanceAwardHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 7975 — Second Chance roulette reward lines.

data.name: ReplacesSpecialCharactersSuchAsWithA
data.value: Replaces block-letter and special UI font characters with normal letters (A–Z, 0–9) in chat text.

data.name: Shared_RequiresCraftingFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter Crafting Channels on the General tab. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: Shared_RequiresGatheringFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter Gathering channels on the General tab. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: Shared_RequiresGatheringHideFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter Gathering channels on the General tab. Checked = hide; unchecked = show.

data.name: Shared_RequiresLootFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter Loot Roll channel on the General tab. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: Shared_RequiresObtainedFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter Obtained channel on the General tab. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: Shared_RequiresObtainedHideFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter Obtained channel on the General tab. Checked = hide; unchecked = show.

data.name: Shared_RequiresSystemFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter System channel on the General tab. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: Shared_RequiresSystemHideFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter System channel on the General tab. Checked = hide; unchecked = show.

data.name: Shared_RequiresProgressFilteringNote
data.value: Requires Filter Progress channel on the General tab. Checked = show; unchecked = hide.

data.name: Shared_RequiresObtainedAndSystemHideFilteringNote
data.value: Obtain lines require Filter Obtained on General (checked = hide). Receive or spend lines require Filter System on General (checked = hide).

data.name: ConfigWindow_SearchHideTomestoneHelp
data.value: Checked = hide this tomestone type. Requires Filter Obtained on General.

data.name: SystemTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Most options need Filter System channel on General (Retainer Sale lines are included). Checked = show; unchecked = hide. Tools → Custom Filters can Block or Allow specific System text.

data.name: SystemTab_ServerAnnouncementsHelpMarker
data.value:
How to handle the server message block shown on login or world travel (welcome headers, in-game event promos, congestion notices, phishing warning).
Show all — unchanged. Hide all — suppress the whole block. Condensed — keep only the per-world "Welcome to <world>!" line; hide the generic "Welcome to FINAL FANTASY XIV" title and event promos. Login only — full block on login (including the FFXIV title), nothing on world-hops. Login full, condensed on world-hop — full block on login; on world-hops, only the per-world welcome line (not the FFXIV title or promos). The generic FFXIV welcome line is hidden in every mode except Show all, Hide phishing only, and the login portion of Login only / Login full, condensed on world-hop. Hide phishing warning only — keeps greeting and event text, removes the phishing/congestion warning and its URL.
Uses localized matching for all supported client languages (EN/DE/FR/JP).

data.name: SystemTab_ShowActiveHelpEntryMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1286 — eg. Active Help entry added. Tutorial pop-ups for new content and UI features.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowAetherCompassMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 3712 — eg. The compass detects a current approximately 143 yalms to the West...

data.name: SystemTab_ShowAetheryteTicketMessageHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 503, 535 (Item), 4591 (System) — eg. You used an aetheryte ticket. (Remaining: 674).

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicBookStepMessages
data.value: Show ARR Relic book step completed messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicBookStepMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4400 — eg. All objectives under the category Dungeons for <Relic Weapon> - Strength +2 complete!

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicProgressMessages
data.value: Show ARR Relic book step progress messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowARRRelicProgressMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4402 — eg. Record of Ouranos kill (1/1) added for <Relic Weapon> - Strength +2.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowAttuneAetheryteMessageHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1341 — attune confirmation, separate from ticket ready (503) and used (535).

data.name: SystemTab_ShowChangesDiscardedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4242 — e.g. Changes have been discarded.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowChangesLostHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 802 — e.g. Unsaved changes have been lost.

data.name: SystemTab_HideCrackedClustersMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Hides cracked cluster obtain messages such as Dendroclusters and Anthoclusters. eg. You obtain a cracked dendrocluster

data.name: SystemTab_ShowDutyEndedMessageHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1534 — e.g. The duty will end in 5 minutes.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowDutyMechanicMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 605, 2119 — duty mechanic events and calm pocket.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowDutyObjectiveBonusHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 2163 — bonus objective rewards on the loot notice channel.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowEverythingElseHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for the four specific system messages below (not a catch-all for all system chat). When on, use the nested options. Unchecking disables all nested options in chat until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings for next time).

data.name: SystemTab_HideFateLevelSyncMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 2070, 2166 — eg. You are 6 or more levels above the recommended level for this FATE. Checked = hide this message.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowGearDyeAppliedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 10508 — eg. You use a pot of Dalamud Red Dye to change Dye 1 of …

data.name: SystemTab_ShowGearItemsRepairedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1385, 1388 (System) — eg. Linen Cowl is repaired. / 2 items repaired.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowGearsetGlamourRestoreFailedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1900 — eg. Gearset equipped, but glamours could not be restored.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowGlamourAlteredHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 3911 — glamour appearance altered. Also outfit glamour stored in the dresser (removed from inventory → stored as … outfit glamour).

data.name: SystemTab_ShowGlamourPlatePartialApply
data.value: Show glamour plate partial apply errors

data.name: SystemTab_ShowGlamourPlatePartialApplyHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4378 — eg. Glamour plate could only be partially applied.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowGlamourPlateProjectedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4364 — eg. Glamours projected from plate 1.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowHostilePresenceMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 3240 — hostile presence sensed on the Battle System channel. Independent of “You sense something…” above.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowInstancedAreaMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1350, 2055, 2056, 2059 — e.g. You are now in the instanced area…

data.name: SystemTab_ShowInstanceMessageHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for duty and instance system messages below. When on, use the nested options. Unchecking disables all nested options in chat until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings for next time). Housing ward below is separate.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowInventoryItemSearchResultsHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1629–1631 — e.g. 1 item found in the 4th tab of your inventory.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowItemSearchResultsMessageHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for inventory item search and location search lines below. When on, use the nested options. Unchecking disables all nested options in chat until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings for next time).

data.name: SystemTab_ShowJobChangeMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 561, 756, 1281 — eg. You change to Scholar., Paladin registered.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowLevelNoLongerSyncedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 619 — level is no longer synced.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowLocationDiscoveredMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 88 — e.g. New location discovered! Independent of “You sense something…” above.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowMailAttachmentMessages
data.value: Show items attached to sent mail

data.name: SystemTab_ShowMailAttachmentMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 672, 673 — eg. You attach 2 pots of Dalamud Red Dye to the letter.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowNumberOfCoffers
data.value: Show number of available coffers messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowOnlineStatusMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 97 — eg. Updating online status to Away from Keyboard.

data.name: SystemTab_HideOrchestrionPlayingHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 3433 — eg. Orchestrion now plays <song>. Checked = hide this message.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowPersonalMessageBookMessages
data.value: Show personal message book new entry messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowPersonalMessageBookMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 6066 — eg. A new entry has been added to your message book. Uses the message-book channel.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowPortraitMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 5865 — eg. Portrait set as instant portrait., Portrait has expired.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowReceivedCommendationsHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 926 — eg. You received a player commendation!

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSanctuaryMessageHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 732, 733 — eg. You have entered a sanctuary. / You have left the sanctuary.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSayReminder
data.value: Show reminders of what to /say in chat during quests

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSayReminderHelpMarker
data.value: eg. With the chat mode in Say, enter a phrase containing “Tataru” at the destination point.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSRankSpawnAnnouncement
data.value: Show S Rank Hunt spawn announcement

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSRankSpawnAnnouncementHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 9331 — eg. You sense the presence of a powerful mark...

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSSRankMinionSpawnAnnouncementHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 9332 — eg. The minions of an extraordinarily powerful mark are on the hunt for prey... The minions of an extraordinarily powerful mark have withdrawn...

data.name: SystemTab_ShowTryOnGlamourMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: Master toggle for glamour cast, plates, dye, and related system lines below. When on, use the nested options. Unchecking disables all nested options in chat until you turn this back on (nested checkboxes keep their settings for next time). Spiritbound and coffer options below are separate.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowVistaMessages
data.value: Show vista arrival and stray messages

data.name: SystemTab_ShowVistaMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1272, 1273 — eg. You have arrived at a vista! and You have strayed too far from the vista.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowYouSenseSomethingMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 2600 — spidey-senses line on the System channel. Location discovered (88) and hostile presence (3240) below are separate toggles, not controlled by this master.

data.name: ToolsTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Debug mode logs rule matches to chat. Chat History and Custom Filters are optional extras; Custom Filters run after all other rules.

data.name: WhitelistTab_AllowBlockHelpMarker
data.value:
Block — force hide when the pattern matches and a channel is selected.
Allow — force show when the pattern matches (useful for gathering flavor or other lines hidden by default). Requires the matching master filter on General to be enabled (e.g. Filter Gathering for gathering Allow rules).

data.name: WhitelistTab_ChannelsHelpMarker
data.value:
Only runs on checked channels. A row with no channels selected never matches.
Login/Logout covers Free Company login/logout lines. Progress covers Progress and Battle System.

data.name: WhitelistTab_ExactNameMatchWhitelistExplanation
data.value: Player names must match chat exactly (including periods): Example N., E. Name, or E. N. Use /pattern/ for regex. Use #588 or #588,589 for LogMessage IDs (see Filters help above).

data.name: WhitelistTab_ExplanationMessage
data.value: Add a row and press Enter. The Filters column accepts plain text, /pattern/ for regex, or #123 / #123,456 for LogMessage IDs — hover the Filters header for details. Custom filters run after normal TidyChat rules and override the result for matching lines.

data.name: WhitelistTab_FilteringNote
data.value: Block hides matching lines. Allow shows matching lines even when another filter would hide them. Pick at least one channel per row. Gathering covers Gathering and Gathering System. System covers System and Retainer Sale. Loot is the Obtained (loot notice) channel.

data.name: WhitelistTab_FiltersHelpMarker
data.value:
Plain text — matches if the sender or message contains the text (see match mode below).
Regex — wrap the pattern in slashes, e.g. /cosmic container/i or /winged shadow|golden/i (case-insensitive by default).
LogMessage ID — prefix with # and one or more IDs, e.g. #588 or #748,4578. Allow/block applies in OnLogMessage before chat display. Regex and text filters do not apply to #ID rows.

data.name: WhitelistTab_ShowAllMessagesByWhitelistedPlayer
data.value: Show all messages sent by whitelisted player

data.name: WhitelistTab_ShowAllMessagesByWhitelistedPlayerHelpMarker
data.value: Bypass all filters for every message sent by a player name entry (not regex or #ID rows). Useful for always seeing a friend's chat.

data.name: WhitelistTab_ShowAllMessagesTargetingWhitelistedPlayer
data.value: Show all messages targeting a whitelisted player

data.name: WhitelistTab_ShowAllMessagesTargetingWhitelistedPlayerHelpMarker
data.value: Bypass all filters when a player name appears in the message text (not regex or #ID rows).

data.name: DesynthesisTab_ShowObtainedItemsFromDesynthesisMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 4322, 4323 — eg. You obtain undyed boarskin.

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaExtractedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1200 — eg. You extract a Savage Aim Materia VI from your gear.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowLoginMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 3085 — eg. Raven Reaver logs in. Uses the FC login/logout channel (no Filter System toggle).

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaShattersMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1955 — eg. The materia shatters as you attempt to retrieve it.

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaOvermeldFailuresMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1202 — eg. You fail to attach a Savage Aim Materia VII to your gear.

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowMateriaSuccesfullyAttachedMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1201 — eg. You attach a Savage Aim Materia VI.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowFishingHoleDiscoveredHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1130, 3513, 3579 — eg. You discover a fishing hole!

data.name: PartyTab_ShowReceivedPartyInvitationMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 3, 1885, 1895 — eg. Raven Reaver invites you to a party.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowTradeRequestSentHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 33 — eg. You initiate trade with Raven Reaver.

data.name: SystemTab_ShowNumberOfCoffersHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 4233, 4238, 4246 — eg. 2 items in your glamour dresser are eligible for glamours you can store in your armoire.

data.name: MateriaTab_ShowSuccesfullyRetrievedMateriaMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1953, 1954 — eg. You retrieve a Savage Aim Materia VI from your gear.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowLocationGatheringEffectMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1096, 1098, 5550, 5551 — eg. Location effects your gathering yield.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowTradeCompleteHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 38 — eg. You complete the trade with Raven Reaver.

data.name: AlliedSocietiesTab_HideTribalCurrencyByIdHelpMarker
data.value: Checked = hide obtain messages for this allied society currency.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowDisbandAndDissolveMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 72, 73, 7447 — eg. The party is dissolved.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowLogoutMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 3086, 84 — eg. Raven Reaver logs out. Uses the FC login/logout channel or System.

data.name: ToolsTab_EnableDebugModeHelpMarker
data.value: Logs which filter rules would match without blocking messages (dry-run). Does not change actual filtering behavior.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowJoinedCrossworldPartyMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 61, 7444 — eg. You have joined a cross-world party with Raven Reaver.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowTradeCanceledHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 36 — eg. Raven Reaver cancels the trade.

data.name: FreeCompanyTab_ShowFreeCompanyMessageBookMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 3087, 6065, 3127 — eg. A company message has been added to the message book.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowSentPartyInviteMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1 — eg. You invite Raven Reaver to a party.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowPartyObjectiveOnJoinHelpMarker
data.value: Companion to Show joined cross-world party messages. Temporarily bypasses Filter System so the join line can include the party objective and comment.

data.name: ToolsTab_DebugIncludeChannelHelpMarker
data.value: Prefixes each debug line with the chat channel type.

data.name: DesynthesisTab_ShowDesynthesisLevelIncreasesMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4325 — eg. Desynthesis level rises to 100.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowTeleportOfferFromPartyMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 440 — eg. You have been offered a Teleport to Limsa Lominsa Lower Decks from Raven Reaver.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowGatheringStartEndHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1063–1070 — eg. You begin gathering. / You finish gathering.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowObtainedSandsFromAetherialReductionMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 3555 — eg. You obtain aetherial reduction sand.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowJoiningPartyMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 60 — eg. Raven Reaver joins the party.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowGatheringSensesLabelHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1086, 3501, 3502, 3518, 3519 — eg. You sense the fertile presence of minerals.

data.name: DesynthesisTab_ShowItemBeingDesynthesizedHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 4321 — eg. You desynthesize the Boarskin Ring.

data.name: EconomyTab_ShowTradeAwaitingConfirmationHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 32 — eg. Awaiting trade confirmation from Raven Reaver.

data.name: PartyTab_ShowLeftPartyMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 4, 69 — eg. Raven Reaver leaves the party.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowFishAddedToGuideMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessages 1116, 3511, 5584, 11333 — eg. Something bites! / You reel in your line.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowMoochingHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1121 — eg. You mooch a fish!

data.name: SystemTab_ShowSpiritboundMessagesHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 744 — eg. Your gear has reached 100% spiritbond.

data.name: GatheringTab_ShowFishingHoleNameHelpMarker
data.value: LogMessage 1110 — eg. You cast your line at the Jade Zigzag.
